## SDK Generation Status — Azure NetApp Files (2026-01-01)

| Python | ✅ Completed | [azure-sdk-for-python#46408](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46408) | [Build 6180384](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6180384) |
| .NET | ✅ Completed | PR link not yet available — see pipeline | [Build 6180385](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6180385) |
| JavaScript | ✅ Completed | [azure-sdk-for-js#38216](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38216) | [Build 6180386](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6180386) |
| Java | ✅ Completed | [azure-sdk-for-java#48871](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48871) | [Build 6180387](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6180387) |
| Go | ✅ Completed | [azure-sdk-for-go#26628](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/pull/26628) | [Build 6180388](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6180388) |
